classification_rationale: This repo is a developer-onboarding scaffold collection, not a protocol authority. README.md:1-3 "Starter templates and boilerplates for AFI Protocol"; package.json:3 description matches; AGENTS.md:28 "This repo contains templates only, not runnable applications" and AGENTS.md:35 "Do not add production logic here." It holds no schemas, no spec docs, no contracts, no canonical type definitions. The only concrete asset is one deployment scaffold (self-hosted-pipeline/) that wires together other repos' artifacts. It supports the ecosystem (bootstrapping) without defining normative rules; hence SUPPORTING rather than REFERENCE_IMPL (it ships no working spine of its own, only Dockerfiles that clone afi-gateway/afi-reactor) or DOCS (it is templates/config, not narrative docs).
primary_purpose: Provides clone-and-extend starter templates and a self-hosted deployment kit (Docker/compose + Fly/Render/Railway manifests) so developers and agents can quickly bootstrap AFI-compatible projects, currently containing only a "self-hosted-pipeline" starter that stands up an afi-gateway + afi-reactor + MongoDB stack.
protocol_touchpoints: DAG/pipeline (reactor enrichmentNodes configs + Pipehead plugin template)
TSSD/vault (Mongo persistence env vars only, no schema)
SDK/API (gateway server referenced as deploy target; README mentions afi-sdk-ts/afi-sdk-python starters not yet present)

reference_only_assumptions.quote:
services:
  mongo:
    image: mongo:7
    ... volumes:
      - mongo_data:/data/db

databases:
  - name: afi-mongo
    databaseName: afi_tssd
    ipAllowList: []

// Custom enrichment plugin template compatible with afi-reactor Pipehead interface
import type { Pipehead, PipelineState } from "afi-reactor/src/types/dag.js";

contradictions.title: Self-hosted starter presents Mongo as the only persistence layer (Mongo tunnel vision)
contradictions.detail: The portable-protocol north star requires multi-engine vaults (Mongo/PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB/InfluxDB per vault.schema.json) and forbids a Mongo-only-as-only-layer design. The only deployment starter hard-codes mongo:7 as the single datastore across compose, render, and railway manifests, with no commitment plane (BASE), no analytics plane, and no alternative-DB guidance. New developers cloning this kit will assume AFI == Mongo + reactor.
contradictions.evidence:
self-hosted-pipeline/docker-compose.yml:4-10 'mongo:
  image: mongo:7'; render.yaml:24-27 'databases:
  - name: afi-mongo databaseName: afi_tssd'; .env.example:1-2 '# Core persistence
AFI_TSSD_MONGODB_URI=mongodb://mongo:27017'

contradictions.title: Reactor presented as THE pipeline engine in the only starter
contradictions.detail: Tension #1: reactor is reference-only, not the mandated orchestrator. The starter names its docker service 'reactor', clones afi-reactor as the pipeline service, and the plugin template imports the concrete afi-reactor Pipehead/PipelineState types as the integration contract, with no mention that any conforming DAG framework (custom DAG, Mage blocks) is acceptable.
contradictions.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/Dockerfile:3 'ARG REACTOR_REPO=https://github.com/AFI-Protocol/afi-reactor.git'; plugins/custom.plugin.ts:2 'import type { Pipehead, PipelineState } from "afi-reactor/src/types/dag.js";'; docker-compose.yml:28 'reactor:'

contradictions.title: README advertises many starters that do not exist (stale/aspirational catalog)
contradictions.detail: README lists 9 named starters across Agent/Integration/Full-Stack categories (e.g. starter-signal-generator, starter-validator, starter-typescript-app, starter-trading-bot) and a usage example cloning 'afi-starters/starter-typescript-app', but none exist in the repo; the only present directory is self-hosted-pipeline/. AGENTS.md also references nonexistent starters/, templates/, examples/ dirs. This is documentation/code drift that misleads developers about available surface.
contradictions.evidence: README.md:11-31 lists starter-signal-generator/.../starter-research-tool and 'cd afi-starters/starter-typescript-app'; filesystem shows only self-hosted-pipeline/; AGENTS.md:44-47 'starters/ ... templates/ ... examples/'

upstream: afi-reactor (Dockerfile clones REACTOR_REPO; runs dist/src/server.js; plugin template imports afi-reactor/src/types/dag.js)

notable_findings.title: Mongo hardcoded as sole datastore in all deploy manifests
notable_findings.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/docker-compose.yml:4-6 'mongo:\n  image: mongo:7'; .env.example:2-4 'AFI_TSSD_MONGODB_URI=mongodb://mongo:27017 / AFI_TSSD_DB_NAME=afi_tssd / AFI_TSSD_COLLECTION=tssd_signals'; render.yaml:25 'name: afi-mongo'
notable_findings.recommendation: Add a note/variant showing the vault is pluggable (PostgreSQL/TimescaleDB/InfluxDB per vault.schema.json); frame Mongo as the reference persistence engine, not a requirement.

notable_findings.title: Plugin template binds to concrete afi-reactor types as the integration contract
notable_findings.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/plugins/custom.plugin.ts:1-2 '// Custom enrichment plugin template compatible with afi-reactor Pipehead interface' + 'import type { Pipehead, PipelineState } from "afi-reactor/src/types/dag.js";'
notable_findings.recommendation: Clarify that conformance is to schema/output contracts, not to afi-reactor's internal Pipehead type; reference plugin-manifest.schema.json so plugins remain DAG-framework-agnostic.

notable_findings.title: Reactor and gateway pinned as the only services in the self-hosted spine
notable_findings.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/Dockerfile:2-3 'ARG GATEWAY_REPO=.../afi-gateway.git / ARG REACTOR_REPO=.../afi-reactor.git'; railway.json:4-16 deployments 'afi-gateway' and 'afi-reactor'
notable_findings.recommendation: Label this kit explicitly as 'reference spine (one working stack)' so it is not read as the mandatory architecture.

notable_findings.title: TSSD persistence referenced via env vars only; no vault schema, lifecycle, or public/proprietary surface
notable_findings.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/.env.example:1-4 'AFI_TSSD_MONGODB_URI / AFI_TSSD_DB_NAME=afi_tssd / AFI_TSSD_COLLECTION=tssd_signals' — no RAW->ENRICHED->...->REPLAYED lifecycle or schema present
notable_findings.recommendation: None for this repo; vault.schema.json and lifecycle semantics live in afi-config; this starter just supplies a connection string.

notable_findings.title: No commitment (BASE on-chain) plane and no analytics plane in the only starter
notable_findings.evidence: Pattern searches for mint/coordinateMint/beneficiary/epoch/AFIMintCoordinator/EmissionsMinted and BigQuery/kafka/warehouse returned zero hits across the repo (grep over all non-.git files).
notable_findings.recommendation: Optionally add a stub/README note that mint/receipt anchoring (afi-token/afi-mint) and market analytics are separate planes a self-hoster must wire in; currently absent.

notable_findings.title: No replay/determinism or USS/CPJ ingest artifacts present
notable_findings.evidence: grep for 'replay|ReplaySession|determinism|codex|usignal|USS|cpj|CPJ' returned zero hits; configs only declare reactor enrichmentNodes (configs/full.json:4-11) with no pinned-version/topology-replay metadata.
notable_findings.recommendation: None (out of scope for a bootstrap kit); replay-critical artifacts live in afi-config/afi-reactor/validator specs.

notable_findings.title: README starter catalog and AGENTS.md directory map describe nonexistent content
notable_findings.evidence: README.md:11-31 lists 9 starters + 'cd afi-starters/starter-typescript-app'; only self-hosted-pipeline/ exists. AGENTS.md:44-47 references starters/, templates/, examples/ dirs that are absent.
notable_findings.recommendation: Tag as stale; trim README/AGENTS.md to reflect actual content or mark unbuilt starters as 'planned'.

notable_findings.title: Skills manifest fetch is best-effort and may silently no-op
notable_findings.evidence: self-hosted-pipeline/Dockerfile:14 'RUN git clone --depth 1 --branch ${SKILLS_REF} ${SKILLS_REPO} skills || true' while AFI_SKILLS_MANIFEST_PATH still points at /app/skills/manifest.json (Dockerfile:36)
notable_findings.recommendation: None (observation); a missing manifest could surprise self-hosters at gateway runtime; consider a clearer warning.
